---
title: "Balls from bag"
format:
  html:
    df-print: paged
execution:
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| output: false
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
bag <- c("B", "W1", "W2", "W3")

ss <- expand_grid(
  D1 = bag,
  D2 = bag,
  D3 = bag
)

ss <- ss %>%
  mutate(
    D1 = (D1 %in% c("B")),
    D2 = (D1 %in% c("B")),
    D3 = (D1 %in% c("B"))
  )

ss
```

```{r}
ss %>%
  mutate(
    E = TRUE,
    H = (D1 & !D2 & D3)) %>%
  summarise(
    p_E       = mean(E),
    p_H       = mean(H),
    p_E_and_H = mean(E & H),
    p_H_given_E = p_E_and_H / p_E
  )
```
